dataList.name: Post-Heishou Choice Development
dataList.desc:
Their duties completed, the Heishous are handing out the Mao Boluses they received from the Heishou-Xianren.

"And you, who are you? I haven't seen you around..."

"Perhaps they're the newly-initiated Hares?"

"... Identify yourselves."

options.message:
Show them the Harestride and tell them you're new.
<size=75%><color=#a16a3b>Choice unlocked with the E.G.O Gift "Harestride"</color></size>
options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift
result: Once they've seen the Harestride, the Heishous moved on, leaving a Mao Bolus with the Sinner.

options.message: Tell them you're a Hare returned from a duty elsewhere.
options.messageDesc: Run a Gluttony & Pride Advantage check to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Say that you're just passing by.
result: We passed by the Heishous with nonchalance and left unscathed.

dataList.name: Oddly Familiar Boombox
dataList.desc:
We see a group of the Middle's thugs blocking the path ahead, all donning the same attire as the ones we saw at the Great Lake.

Going right through them would risk a battle.

Looking around, we find a lone boombox some distance from them.

Is that the source of the raucous music that plays in the background whenever these thugs show up?

Perhaps moving it somewhere else would bait the thugs away from the road with its music.

options.messageDesc: Gluttony Advantage check. Pass to gain a Blunt E.G.O Gift.

result:
There is no reason for us to risk a battle by taking this route.

We quietly turned our course and moved on via another path.
